page_metadata.biotools__summary: AutoCloner is a custom pipeline that designs homeologue-specific primers for polyploids. It achieves this by extracting SNP locations unique to your gene of interest, and placing the 3` ends of primers at these SNPs.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: AutoCloner is a custom pipeline that designs homeologue-specific primers for polyploids. It achieves this by extracting SNP locations unique to your gene of interest, and placing the 3` ends of primers at these SNPs.
